name: eslint-plugin-codex-taste
description: ESLint-compatible oxlint plugins for selected Codex React and TypeScript taste rules.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/react-taste.js && node --check src/typescript-taste.js && node --check src/utils.js && node --check src/built-in-taste-rules.js
scripts.fmt: oxfmt src tests package.json package-lock.json oxlint.config.mjs tsconfig.json
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check src tests package.json package-lock.json oxlint.config.mjs tsconfig.json
